import_settings.texture_type: Default for world decal materials; Sprite (2D and UI) with Multiple slicing is also acceptable for atlas cropping.
import_settings.compression: None for V1 source review; high-quality compression can be tested after in-game readability checks.
import_settings.notes: Use source_rect_px from each entry if slicing individual decals from a sheet.
